matchingDescription: UK investment platform, Lifetime ISA for first-time buyers, low-cost SIPP, stocks and shares ISA

variants.text: Save for your first home with AJ Bell's Lifetime ISA and earn a 25% government bonus on up to £4,000 per year — simple, low-cost investing toward your deposit. Capital at risk.
AJ Bell's Stocks and Shares ISA offers low-cost dealing from £1.50 per trade — a straightforward way to invest in funds, shares, and ETFs. Capital at risk.
Plan for retirement with AJ Bell's low-cost SIPP — access thousands of investments and manage your pension alongside your ISA. Capital at risk.

HMRC data shows fewer than 40% of eligible first-time buyers use a Lifetime ISA, missing up to £1,000 per year in government bonuses. The maximum bonus over the full 32-year contribution window (ages 18–50) is £32,000.

Saving £400 per month into a Lifetime ISA from age 25 generates £12,000 in government bonuses alone by age 35 — without any investment returns. That's equivalent to 14.4 months of additional savings at the same rate.

With average UK first-home prices above £300,000, a 10% deposit requires over three years of £833 monthly savings. A Lifetime ISA's 25% government bonus reduces the required saving period by roughly nine months on average.
